app.title: CuteSpace
app.subtitle: Your tiny bubble for routines and shortcuts
app.subtitle.cute: Your tiny bubble for routines and shortcuts
app.subtitle.forge: Your power hub for routines and shortcuts
app.subtitle.flow: Your clean workspace for focused work
clipboard.hint: Click a saved item to copy it again.
startup.title: Start CuteSpace with Windows?
startup.message: CuteSpace can start automatically and keep the bubble ready when your PC turns on. You can change this later in Settings.
settings.title: Settings
settings.startupMode: Mode to run when Windows starts
settings.importSuccess: Data imported. Please restart the app.
style.firstRunMessage: You can change it later in Settings. The style changes the name, colors, bubble, and sounds.
style.cute.label: Soft kawaii
style.forge.label: Bold and gamer
style.flow.label: Clean office
mode.name: Mode name
mode.runAtStartup: Run this mode when Windows starts
item.name: Display name
picker.kind: What do you want to add?
picker.kindMessage: You can choose a file or a folder.
url.title: Web page
url.urlsHelp: You can add several pages. If you choose a specific browser, they open as tabs in that browser.
icon.title: Choose an icon
help.modes.title: Modes
help.modes.body: A mode opens several items in order: apps, files, folders, and groups of web pages. Web items can include multiple URLs and a detected browser. You can also run a mode when Windows starts.
help.shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
help.shortcuts.body: Use shortcuts for quick things without a full routine. Add detected apps, .exe files, folders, Windows tools, or pages. One click selects, another click deselects, and double click opens.
help.clipboard.title: Recent copied items
help.clipboard.body: Keeps recent text, links, and images. Click to copy again, preview to see it larger, and delete to clean an entry.
